retrieved_result: Seth Meyers (I) "SEE RANKSeth Meyers (I)Writer | Actor | Producer Seth Meyers was born on December 28, 1973 in Bedford, New Hampshire, USA as Seth Adam Meyers. He is a writer and actor, known for Saturday Night Live (1975), New Year's Eve (2011) and Documentary Now! (2015). He has been married to Alexi Ashe Meyers
